forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 17.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection 12:30pm to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Areas of fog in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 13.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog near the eastern border in the late morning. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Possible small hail in the evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Areas of fog in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 12.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Possible small hail in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Patchy fog in the late morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 18.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Patchy fog. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. The chance of fog in the east in the early morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

The chance of morning frost on and east of the ranges. The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. The chance of morning frost south of Hawker. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of morning frost on and east of the ranges. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 24.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the west coast in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 23.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 23.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 24.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.
Sunny. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.
